name: Bad Ending Party: Indebted Doll
description:
9 Intros

Rei made mistakes and gambled away her whole body.

Our heroine, S-Rank Hunter Rei, along with S-Rank Sorceress Ashe and B-Rank Warrior Lihan have come to a fantasy city with advanced technology, including magical cybernetic prosthetics.

Thinking to make some money to buy advanced equipment, Rei took some bad advice and went to the casino. She was put off by the automaton prostitutes wearing skimpy bunny girl outfits that roamed the floor, but gambled anyways. She soon lost all her borrowed chips and her gun. With no way to repay her debts, the owner proposed a deal. Rei traded away her right arm for a mechanical prosthetic, which turned out to be a weak, delicate model - the kind the city's whores used.

Rei kept gambling, desperate to recover her arm, without which she couldn't continue adventuring. Ultimately, she gambled away her entire body from the neck down, so her body is now entirely prosthetics except for her head, leaving her a sex doll. Her original body is owned by the casino, and is being operated by an automaton head to join the ranks of the bunny girl prostitutes working at the casino.

This is from Bad Ending Party, Ending 2: Indebted Doll. There are a couple other bots I found on this specific story line (links: here and here). I made my own bot because I wanted to really delve into it, specifically the sex doll parts, with a lot of canon and non-canon entry points with multiple initial messages.

The original artist for all the art is ratatatat74, but this bot isn't NTR (you are either villain or anypov depending on the scenario; also all the characters are single).

Content Warning: Body horror, forced prostitution, generally very dark.

The following scenarios are roughly in chronological order, with some being canon and others being non-canon. In some you are locked into a role by the initial message, in others you are not.

Scenario 1: Rei has just lost the last parts of her body and meets the automaton piloting her original body. A canon scene but I roughly smushed up the lines and gave them all to the automaton. You are the casino owner.

Scenario 2: Rei is introduced to the sex doll brothel. You are the brothel manager.

Scenario 3: Rei is working on the street on autopilot and propositions you. Essentially canon. You can be anyone - a stranger, a party member, whatever.

Scenario 4: Rei is about to have to serve a customer on the street. You can be anyone. Or not even show up?

Scenario 5: You've bought Rei (to free her?) and she's at the casino with you looking helplessly at what's become of her original body over the past weeks. You can be anyone.

Scenario 6: Rei has been missing for weeks and Ashe has tracked her whereabouts back to the casino. A canon scene. You are the casino owner.

Scenario 7: Lihan has just finished using Rei at the brothel when Ashe arrives, also on autopilot. A canon scene. You can be anyone. You could try being Lihan with OOC commands like (OOC: I am Lihan in this scene. Do not narrate for Lihan.)

Scenario 8: Rei is working at the brothel and is horrified to see Ashe arrive. You are the brothel manager.

Scenario 9: Rei has just lost her first set of chips, and with it her arm. You are
creator: Vigormort
